cases.prompt: Which Microsoft Purview solution should I use for my scenario?

expect.label: Don't deploy enforcement before classification maturity
Scope by data sensitivity and regulatory driver, not feature availability
Map goal to specific Purview solution (DLP / classification / eDiscovery / IRM / lifecycle)

cases.prompt: Where do I start with Microsoft Purview for a new tenant?

expect.label: Start with classification / discovery before enforcement
Sequence: classification → labels → DLP audit → DLP block → lifecycle → insider risk
Run simulation / audit mode 7-14 days on pilot before tenant-wide

cases.prompt: What licence and roles do I need to roll out Purview features?

expect.label: Validate licensing before designing - advanced features need E5 / E5 Compliance
Use scoped Purview role groups, not Compliance Administrator / Org Management
Anti-pattern: Org Management for Purview admin team / over-assigning roles
